metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore advanced tourism management principles, event planning strategies, and hospitality industry operations. This course emphasizes understanding tourism's economic and cultural impacts, managing visitor experiences, and pursuing hospitality-related careers.
metadata.general_description: Advanced tourism management, event planning, hospitality industry operations, and tourism career pathways.

big_ideas.statement: Tourism creates economic opportunities while influencing cultural, environmental, and social impacts on destinations
big_ideas.elaboration: Effective tourism management balances economic benefits with cultural preservation and environmental sustainability.

big_ideas.statement: Visitor experiences are created through coordinated service delivery, quality management, and hospitality excellence
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful tourism organizations deliver memorable experiences through attention to detail, customer service, and experience design.

big_ideas.statement: Event planning and management require comprehensive coordination of logistics, stakeholders, and resources
big_ideas.elaboration: Events range from intimate gatherings to large-scale conferences, each requiring tailored planning and execution strategies.

big_ideas.statement: Hospitality and tourism careers offer diverse opportunities aligned with individual skills and interests
big_ideas.elaboration: The tourism industry encompasses roles in accommodation, food service, transportation, attractions, and event management.

competencies.raw: Design tourism experiences and itineraries that meet diverse visitor needs
i_can_statements: I can analyze visitor preferences and demographic characteristics
I can design themed itineraries and packages
I can incorporate cultural and natural attractions strategically
I can create memorable experience touchpoints

competencies.raw: Design events and activities that engage audiences and achieve objectives
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize events aligned with audience interests
I can design program content and participant flow
I can plan logistics and venue layouts
I can design post-event evaluation and feedback mechanisms

competencies.raw: Design hospitality operations that ensure quality service delivery
i_can_statements: I can design service standards and quality assurance systems
I can develop staff training and development programs
I can design operational workflows and procedures
I can create customer feedback and complaint resolution systems

competencies.raw: Design sustainable tourism strategies that balance economic, cultural, and environmental goals
i_can_statements: I can assess tourism impacts on destinations and communities
I can design sustainability practices for tourism operations
I can develop community engagement and benefit-sharing strategies
I can plan cultural preservation and heritage protection measures

competencies.raw: Apply destination analysis to plan tourist attractions and experiences
i_can_statements: I can analyze destination resources and competitive positioning
I can assess market demand and visitation patterns
I can evaluate attractions and experience quality
I can recommend experience improvements

competencies.raw: Apply event planning skills to coordinate successful tourism and hospitality events
i_can_statements: I can develop comprehensive event budgets and timelines
I can coordinate vendor and supplier relationships
I can manage event logistics and staffing
I can implement risk management and contingency plans

competencies.raw: Apply hospitality service standards to deliver quality guest experiences
i_can_statements: I can implement customer service best practices
I can manage guest requests and special needs
I can resolve guest concerns and conflicts professionally
I can gather and respond to guest feedback

competencies.raw: Apply business management skills to tourism operations
i_can_statements: I can manage budgets and financial performance
I can develop marketing and promotional strategies
I can analyze occupancy rates and revenue optimization
I can manage staff scheduling and payroll

competencies.raw: Use booking and reservation systems effectively
i_can_statements: I can use property management and booking systems
I can manage reservations and check-ins/check-outs
I can handle cancellations and modifications
I can generate occupancy and booking reports

competencies.raw: Use digital marketing and tourism technology platforms
i_can_statements: I can use online travel agencies and booking platforms
I can create and manage tourism websites
I can develop digital marketing campaigns
I can leverage social media for destination promotion

competencies.raw: Use event management and planning software
i_can_statements: I can use event planning and management platforms
I can create event budgets and timelines
I can coordinate vendor communications
I can track event metrics and ROI

competencies.raw: Use point-of-sale and customer relationship management systems
i_can_statements: I can operate point-of-sale systems
I can manage customer databases and profiles
I can track customer preferences and loyalty
I can generate customer analytics and insights

areas.name: Tourism Destination Management and Development
topics: Tourism industry overview and economic significance

areas.name: Event Planning and Management
topics: Event planning process and feasibility analysis
